verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I want to live the way he wants me to live. I want to give until there's just no more to give. I want to love, love till there's just no more love, But I can never ever outlove the Lord.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: There've been times when giving and loving brought pain, And I promised I would never let it happen again, But I found out that loving was worth all the risk, And that even in losing You win.

verse.name: v3
